## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Component

- [ ] Contract (StreamPay)
- [ ] SDK (ouways-sdk)
- [ ] Web

## Environment

- Network / chain id:
- Stream id / addresses:
- SDK version / commit:

## Reproduction

Steps, code, or a failing test.

## Expected vs actual

What you expected, and what happened instead.
